remarks: Beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2-bath duplex located in one of Stamford's most desirable neighborhoods and just a short walk to Cove Beach! This move-in-ready home offers a bright and airy open-concept layout, seamlessly connecting the living room, dining area, and a stunning brand-new kitchen featuring modern cabinetry, beautiful countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a gorgeous center island perfect for entertaining and everyday living. Freshly painted throughout and featuring elegant hardwood floors, this home combines style and comfort in every room. The spacious finished lower level offers a large bonus room that can easily serve as a family room, home office, gym, guest room, or additional bedroom to fit your lifestyle. Both bathrooms have been completely renovated with high-end modern finishes, adding a touch of luxury to this exceptional home. Reserved parking adds convenience, while the unbeatable location puts you minutes from downtown Stamford, restaurants, shopping, the train station, I-95, and the Merritt Parkway for an easy commute. Enjoy the best of Stamford living with Cove Beach just a short stroll away. Don't miss this rare opportunity schedule your showing today!
